title: rubus × choletensis
intro: Rubus × choletensis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or French thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its berries, which contain anthocyanins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × choletensis berries include their potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Rubus × choletensis berries can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
